{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Fisher (Cradle)
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fishers]] are a group of people within the [[Alliance encampment]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
